sinopsis_cat:
Sota un decorat suspès, en una pista circular i dins d’una arena íntima, sou convidats a un univers singular, on conviuen maldestreses i proeses, petits gestos i allò extraordinari, aparença i falses aparences.
Hi haurà cossos flotant i balancejant-se, sols i magnífics. Hi haurà barrets manipulats per un home ell mateix manipulat. Hi haurà apilaments d’abrics, despullaments d’americanes, acumulacions de capots, vols de levites, l’efol·liació de bruses, el desplegament de caçadores, el degoteig de seda.
Hi haurà violins, guitarres, teclats, percussions, objectes insòlits, accidents feliços, éssers fanfara i cossos orquestra.
Un circ intemporal i oníric, que arrossega les ànimes fins a les profunditats de la humanitat.
sinopsis_eng:
Under a suspended set, in a circular ring and inside an intimate arena, you are invited to a singular universe where clumsiness and feats coexist, small gestures and the extraordinary, appearance and false appearances.
 There will be bodies floating and swinging, alone and magnificent. There will be hats manipulated by a man who is himself manipulated. There will be stacks of coats, stripping of jackets, accumulations of capes, flights of tailcoats, the defoliation of blouses, the unfolding of jackets, the dripping of silk.
 There will be violins, guitars, keyboards, percussions, unusual objects, happy accidents, fanfare beings and orchestra bodies.
 A timeless and dreamlike circus that drags souls into the depths of humanity.
